column1: # Sweep agx_micro_b — AGX Tier B training-side micro-perturbations (2000 steps, seed=42)
# PURPOSE: longer runs → lower σ → detect effect sizes down to ~0.003.
# Baseline config matches AGX s30 EXACTLY (LOGIT_SOFTCAP=1000, MATRIX_LR=0.040) for valid σ reuse.
# AGX absolute BPB not comparable to Spark; directional signals only.
# Kill criterion: |Δ quant_bpb vs baseline mean| < 0.003 → NOISE. Promote leads to Spark confirmation.

column2: SCRIPT=train_gpt_agx.py TIMEOUT_SECS=12000 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=11000 DISABLE_TORCH_COMPILE=1 QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=1000 SCALAR_LR=0.030 MATRIX_LR=0.040 TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=32768 TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=1024 ITERATIONS=2000 VAL_LOSS_EVERY=200 SEED=42 EMA_BLEND_ALPHA=1.0 VAL_BATCH_TOKENS=8192 EVAL_SEQ_LEN=512 MAX_VAL_TOKENS=2000000 ARCHIVE_CHECKPOINT=1 FAST_SMOKE=0
